policy.description: FENGARDE retention: common events, delete 30 days after index creation. Age-based only -- WS-3 writes daily date-suffixed indices (events-common-YYYY.MM.DD) directly, no write alias, so ES-style rollover does not apply. ism_template auto-attaches this policy to matching indices at creation time (including tenant-scoped events-common-<tenant>-* indices).
